missing_main_functions: Login Functionality (pre-verification and post-verification login attempts)
Error Message Display and Persistence (inline error messages for all validation failures)
missing_sub_functions: Password field masking and visibility toggle (UX consideration)
Handling of email delivery failure (e.g., invalid email domain, SMTP error)
Account lockout or re-registration after verification link expires (open question)
Resend request rate limiting beyond 60 seconds (e.g., maximum attempts per hour)
duplicate_functions: SUB011 (Expired Verification Link Handling) and CAT009 (Link Expiration After 24 Hours) overlap in scope; consider merging or clarifying distinction.
SUB012 (Resend Request Limits) and CAT010 (Resend Cooldown Period) both address resend functionality; ensure no redundancy.
unclear_categories: CAT012 (First Name Basic Validation) - 'excessively long values' is vague; no specific length or character rules defined.
CAT013 (Last Name Basic Validation) - Same issue as CAT012; lacks clear validation criteria.
CAT014 (Phone Basic Validation) - 'invalid formats' is undefined; no format or allowed characters specified.
recommendations: Add a main function for Login to cover pre-verification and post-verification scenarios.
Add a sub-function for email delivery failure handling to address risk of delayed or failed emails.
Clarify validation rules for First name, Last name, and phone fields with stakeholders to strengthen test categories.
Merge or clearly differentiate SUB011 and CAT009 to avoid duplication.
Define maximum resend request limits (open question) and add corresponding test coverage.
Include test categories for inline error message persistence and clarity for all validation failures beyond duplicate email, invalid password length, and invalid email format.
